items.title: DNS request timed out.
items.author: /u/falling2918
items.content:
I had to open port 53 on not tcp and udp but ALL protocols

sudo ufw allow 53 && sudo ufw reload

Im running adguardhome version on a Debian 12 install and my dns requests are timing out. This was working until a few days ago when I suddenly stopped getting and requests except from localhost (Not localhost but the servers ip). The ports are open in the ufw AND iptables configs. Port 53 is open from other devices but adguardhome doesnt see it/respond to queries. The adguard server is bound to the correct ip (192.168.1.2) but only responds to it locally.
